risks.title: Multiple events for same security file
risks.evidence: 4 events for Security.tsx with timestamps within 17ms; 2 flagged as duplicates suggesting event deduplication failure
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer configuration - multiple firing of same event indicates potential watch/rebuild loop or duplicate file monitoring

risks.title: Unvalidated security module changes
risks.evidence: Security.tsx modified with no mention of test execution or security validation; frontend security components need explicit review
risks.recommendedAction: Run security tests immediately and conduct code review for Security.tsx to identify potential vulnerabilities

risks.title: High event relevance without context
risks.evidence: Events 2 and 4 have high relevance (0.95, 0.85) but actual changes are unknown - blind spot in risk assessment
risks.recommendedAction: Retrieve and display the actual diff to understand scope of Security.tsx changes

opportunities.title: Consolidate security review workflow
opportunities.evidence: Multiple high-relevance events for single security file suggest concentrated change activity
opportunities.suggestedAction: Create a dedicated security module review checklist and automated validation pipeline

opportunities.title: Fix event deduplication in code observer
opportunities.evidence: Duplicate events with microsecond-level timestamp differences indicate systematic observer issue
opportunities.suggestedAction: Implement event fingerprinting (file hash + timestamp windowing) to prevent duplicate notifications

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine actual code modifications to Security.tsx to understand scope, identify potential vulnerabilities, and verify intended changes
taskCandidates.rationale: Security file changes require immediate human review to prevent vulnerabilities from entering production

taskCandidates.title: Run security validation tests
taskCandidates.description: Execute security-focused test suite against Security.tsx changes to validate no vulnerabilities were introduced
taskCandidates.rationale: Automated validation required before merging security-related changes

taskCandidates.title: Investigate event deduplication failure
taskCandidates.description: Debug why code-observer fired 4 events for single file modification; check watch configuration and event fingerprinting
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events waste resources and reduce signal-to-noise ratio; indicates systemic monitoring issue

recommendations.title: Prioritize immediate security review
recommendations.rationale: High-relevance security file modifications require human judgment before downstream processing
recommendations.action: Queue Security.tsx for manual code review within next 15 minutes; block deployment until review complete

recommendations.title: Deduplicate current event batch
recommendations.rationale: 4 events for single change create noise and potential for conflicting actions
recommendations.action: Process only events 2 and 4 (highest relevance); suppress events 1 and 3 as confirmed duplicates

pendingApprovals.reason: Sensitive proactive task requires approval: Review Security.tsx changes
